categories.label: Product Announcements
categories.google_news_query: ("generative AI" OR LLM OR "AI model" OR copilot) (launch OR release OR announcement OR unveiled OR introduced)

categories.label: Trade Deals
categories.google_news_query: ("generative AI" OR LLM OR "AI startup") (deal OR partnership OR contract OR investment OR funding OR acquisition)

categories.label: Industry Use Cases
categories.google_news_query: ("generative AI" OR LLM OR copilot) (deployed OR implemented OR pilot OR workflow OR automation OR use case)

categories.label: Hardware
categories.google_news_query: (AI chip OR GPU OR accelerator OR inference hardware) (launch OR roadmap OR supply OR performance)

categories.label: Research Papers
categories.google_news_query: ("generative AI" OR "large language model" OR "diffusion model") (paper OR research OR benchmark OR arxiv)

arxiv.search_query: (all:"generative ai" OR all:"large language model" OR all:"diffusion model" OR all:"multimodal model")
